posts.content: Born in Rome when Hadrian still shaped the world. Family ties drew me early toward duty and study.
posts.translation: 生于罗马，哈德良尚在世之时。家世早早把我引向责任与学问。

posts.content: Adopted into the imperial line—power came not as conquest but as inheritance of burdens.
posts.translation: 被接入皇室血脉——权力并非征服而来，而是继承重负。

posts.content: Notes to myself in Greek: the soul must stand alone; externals are indifferent—only virtue is good.
posts.translation: 用希腊文写给自己的笔记：灵魂须自守；外物无所谓——惟有德性为善。

posts.content: Campaign fever took me on the Danube. Return all to nature—as smoke becomes air, so the rational soul dissolves.
posts.translation: 征战中病逝于多瑙河畔。把一切都还诸自然——如烟归空，理性之魂亦复如是。
